Interface DRIDesignMeterPlot

All Superinterfaces:
DRIDesignPlot, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
DRDesignMeterPlot
public interface DRIDesignMeterPlot extends DRIDesignPlot

DRIDesignMeterPlot interface.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
